payload.text:
# 📄 mvp-plan.md

## objetivo

Construir AXIS KEY™ como una plataforma institucional de private capital, portfolio-first, enfocada en diversificación en real estate, con:

- Landing institucional premium
- Portal privado tipo “family office dashboard”
- Supabase como infraestructura (Auth + DB + RLS)
- Experiencia dark, institucional, fintech-grade

El MVP no es un portal de fundraising.
Es una infraestructura de portafolio con solicitud de inversión estructurada.

---

## arquitectura general

### Frontend
- Framework: Next.js (App Router)
- Styling: TailwindCSS + custom theme (Axis Key design system)
- Animaciones: Framer Motion (transiciones suaves, no agresivas)
- Charts: Recharts

### Backend (MVP-lite)
- Supabase:
  - Auth (Magic Link / OTP)
  - PostgreSQL
  - Row Level Security (RLS)
  - Storage (documentos)

### Deploy
- Vercel (recomendado por DX + seguridad + preview environments)

---

## alcance del MVP

### 1. Lado Público (Landing Institucional)

Secciones obligatorias:

1. Hero institucional (gradient Axis Blue)
   - Claim: “Portfolio-first private capital infrastructure.”
   - Subclaim: Diversificación + disciplina + alineación de incentivos
   - CTA: Access the Platform

2. Filosofía de inversión
   - Diversification
   - Long-term capital
   - Institutional underwriting
   - Alignment

3. How It Works (3 pasos)
   - Apply & Onboard
   - Build Diversified Portfolio
   - Monitor & Compound

4. Curated Real Estate Focus
   - No crowdfunding
   - No speculation
   - Institutional underwriting committee

5. Team Section (Institutional narrative)

6. For Projects (Sponsors section)
   - Submit opportunity
   - Institutional capital access

7. FAQ

8. Final CTA

Footer:
- Legal disclaimers
- Accredited investor notice
- Not investment advice

---

### 2. Portal Privado (Investor Side)

#### Navegación principal

1. Dashboard
2. Portfolio
3. Distributions
4. Invest More
5. Investor Updates
6. Documents
7. Accreditation
8. Profile & Settings

+ Floating Support Orb (UI component fijo)

---

## flujo principal (usuario inversionista)

1. Usuario entra a landing
2. Click en “Access Platform”
3. Sign in (email magic link)
4. Paso de acreditación:
   - Self-attestation (Yes / Not yet)
   - Guardar estado en profile
5. Accede al Dashboard

---

## funcionalidades clave

### Dashboard

Vista tipo “wealth control center”:

- Total Capital Committed
- Capital Diversified Across X Deals
- Active Allocations
- Pending Commitments
- Geographic Breakdown (chart)
- Strategy Breakdown (chart)

Datos MVP:
- Basados en investment_requests aprobadas

---

### Portfolio (core)

Lista completa de deals activos:

Filtros:
- Strategy
- Geography
- Risk Profile
- Structure (506b / 506c / Reg D etc.)

Cada Deal incluye:
- Target Raise
- Minimum Investment
- Lockup
- Projected IRR
- Preferred Return
- Term
- Investment Committee Approved badge

Botón:
→ “Allocate Capital”

---

### Invest Flow (Allocate Capital)

Modal institucional:

Step 1: Select Investment Account  
Step 2: Enter Allocation Amount (>= minimum)  
Step 3: Risk & disclosure confirmation  
Step 4: Submit Allocation Request  

Resultado:
- Crear registro en `investment_requests`
- Status: pending_committee_review

Mensaje final:
“Your allocation request has been submitted for review.”

---

### Investment Accounts

Un usuario puede crear múltiples:

- Individual
- Corporation
- Trust
- IRA
- 401k

Tabla: investment_accounts

---

### Distributions (estructura MVP)

- Lista por Deal
- Date
- Amount
- Yield %
- Document link

(En MVP puede estar vacío pero con modelo listo)

---

### Documents

- PPM
- OM
- Quarterly reports
- Tax docs (estructura futura)

Storage en Supabase

---

### Accreditation

- Self-attestation inicial
- Status visible:
  - Unknown
  - Self-attested
  - Verified
  - Rejected

Futura integración externa (post-MVP)

---

## modelo de datos (resumen)

### profiles
- id
- full_name
- phone
- accredited_status
- created_at

### deals
- id
- title
- slug
- location
- strategy
- structure
- target_raise
- minimum_investment
- lockup_months
- projected_irr
- preferred_return
- term_years
- committee_approved (boolean)
- status
- created_at

### investment_accounts
- id
- user_id
- type
- display_name
- created_at

### investment_requests
- id
- user_id
- deal_id
- account_id
- amount
- status
- created_at

### distributions (estructura futura lista)
- id
- deal_id
- user_id
- amount
- date
- document_url

---

## exclusiones del MVP

- No money movement
- No ACH/wire integration
- No admin portal completo
- No e-sign
- No real performance calculation engine
- No tax automation

---

## métricas de éxito

- % Landing → Platform access
- % Users → Allocation request
- Average allocation size
- Deals per investor (diversification metric)
- Time from login → allocation

# 🎨 design-style-plan.md

## identidad visual AXIS KEY™

Estética:
Institutional. Dark. Disciplined. Futuristic fintech.

Nunca retail.
Nunca gamificado.

---

## paleta oficial

Primary Dark Background: #081C3A  
Secondary Panels: #0F2A4A  
Deep Axis Blue: #0B2E6D  
Royal Gradient Blue: #1457B6  
Electric Blue: #2F80ED  

Accents:
Cyan Glow: #56CCF2  
Teal Accent: #00E0C6  

Typography:
Headlines: #FFFFFF  
Body: #C9D8F0  
Muted: #8FAEDB  

Hero Gradient:
linear-gradient(135deg, #0B2E6D, #1457B6)

Glass Overlay:
rgba(255,255,255,0.08)

---

## design language

- Dark institutional gradients
- Glassmorphism cards
- Subtle glow edges
- Large spacing
- Professional typography hierarchy
- Clean metrics blocks
- Sharp, minimal icons

No emojis.
No playful UI.
No confetti animations.

---

## landing layout

Hero:
- Full screen
- Gradient background
- Institutional headline
- CTA solid Electric Blue

Philosophy section:
- Dark panel
- 4 core principles grid

Team:
- Minimal portraits
- Clean bios
- No casual language

For Projects:
- Clean submission CTA
- Institutional tone

---

## portal UX

Sidebar:
- Dark glass panel
- Icons + uppercase labels
- Hover glow subtle

Dashboard:
- Metric cards with glass overlay
- Charts in electric blue
- No bright multi-color charts

Portfolio:
- Grid institutional cards
- Committee Approved badge (teal glow)
- Clear IRR, lockup, minimum

Deal Detail:
- Hero panel
- KPI row
- Tab navigation clean
- Allocate button prominent

Invest Modal:
- Multi-step
- Progress indicator minimal
- Clear compliance confirmations

---

## motion principles

- 200–300ms transitions
- Slide-in panels
- Fade + blur for modal
- Subtle hover glow
- No bounce
- No aggressive scaling

---

## emotional objective

Al loguearse el usuario debe sentir:

“I am inside a private capital command center.”
“This feels institutional.”
“This is disciplined capital management.”

Nunca:
“This looks like an investment app.”

# 📑 prd.md

## visión

AXIS KEY™ es una plataforma portfolio-first de private capital que ofrece acceso diversificado a oportunidades inmobiliarias curadas por un Investment Committee, alineando los incentivos de la plataforma con el éxito del inversionista.

---

## problema

Muchos inversionistas:

- Sobreconcentran capital
- Invierten en deals individuales sin diversificación
- Operan en plataformas tipo crowdfunding
- Carecen de reporting institucional

Resultado:
Riesgo elevado y falta de disciplina de portafolio.

---

## solución

AXIS KEY proporciona:

- Infraestructura de portafolio
- Diversificación multi-deal
- Curaduría institucional
- Reporting estructurado
- Alineación de incentivos

---

## usuarios objetivo

Primarios:
- Accredited investors
- Entrepreneurs
- Executives
- Professionals
- Family offices

Secundarios:
- Sponsors
- Real estate developers
- Fund managers

---

## funcionalidades MVP

### 1. Landing institucional completa

### 2. Auth con Supabase

### 3. Dashboard institucional

### 4. Portfolio completo de deals

### 5. Allocation request flow

### 6. Multi investment accounts

### 7. Accreditation status tracking

### 8. Documents section

### 9. Distributions structure ready

---

## requisitos no funcionales

- Experiencia premium dark
- Seguridad con RLS
- Arquitectura escalable
- Código modular
- Rendimiento rápido
- Compatible desktop-first, mobile usable

---

## roadmap post-MVP

- Admin portal institucional
- Investment Committee workflow interno
- ACH/Wire integrations
- E-signature
- Performance analytics real-time
- Waterfall modeling
- Investor capital accounts ledger
- Tax reporting automation
- Sponsor analytics portal

---

## métrica clave de producto

North Star:
Average number of deals per investor.

Indicadores secundarios:
- Allocation volume
- User retention
- Capital diversified per investor
- Repeat allocations
- % accredited verified

---

## definición final

AXIS KEY™ es una infraestructura institucional de capital privado diseñada para construir portafolios diversificados de largo plazo mediante oportunidades inmobiliarias curadas y alineación total con el inversionista.

**Defining the MVP Scope**

I'm now zeroing in on defining the Minimum Viable Product (MVP) scope for the "AXIS KEY™" React application. The emphasis is on building a public landing page and a private investor portal, both with an institutional dark theme using a blue color palette. I'm focusing on core functionalities to get the platform live quickly, and iterating later based on user feedback.


**Outlining the Application Structure**

I'm solidifying the application structure. I've broken it down to specific components: Navbar, Sidebar, LandingHero, various LandingSections, Dashboard, Portfolio, and others. I'm focusing on defining the data models and constants, along with a plan for mocking Supabase for the frontend demonstration. I'm prioritizing the implementation of the core UI components and associated data. I've also planned the files for the implementation.

entries.description: Project metadata defining the application name and description.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Font imports.
Global TypeScript types and interfaces for the platform.
Static data and configuration for AXIS KEY™.

};
